layout.structure: flex h-screen w-full overflow-hidden text-[13px] select-none
layout.sidebar: w-[220px] flex-shrink-0 border-r border-border h-full flex flex-col
layout.main_area: flex-1 flex flex-col h-full min-w-0 bg-background
layout.topbar: h-[44px] flex-shrink-0 border-b border-border flex items-center justify-between px-4 gap-4
layout.statusbar: h-[28px] flex-shrink-0 border-t border-border flex items-center px-4 text-[11px] text-neutral-500

views.icons: grid grid-cols-3 sm:grid-cols-4 md:grid-cols-5 lg:grid-cols-6 xl:grid-cols-8 gap-4 p-6
views.columns: flex h-full w-full overflow-x-auto border-t border-border
views.gallery: flex flex-col h-full items-center justify-start p-6

components.sidebar_item: flex items-center gap-2 px-2.5 py-1 mx-2 rounded-md transition-colors text-[13px] cursor-default
components.breadcrumb: flex items-center gap-1 text-[13px] font-medium text-neutral-700 dark:text-neutral-300
components.view_switcher: flex items-center p-0.5 bg-neutral-100 dark:bg-[#323232] rounded-md border border-border shadow-sm
components.view_switcher_button: px-2 py-1 rounded-[4px] text-neutral-600 dark:text-neutral-400 transition-all
components.context_menu: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 dark:bg-[#282828]/80 border border-neutral-200 dark:border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)] rounded-lg p-1

images.description: Landscape preview for Gallery or Quick Look
Abstract preview for Gallery or Quick Look
Architecture preview for Gallery or Quick Look

icons.usage: Use strokeWidth={1.25} or {1.5} to mimic SF Symbols perfectly. Sidebar icons should be size={16} or {14}. Content icons size={48} for Icon view, size={16} for List view.

shadcn_customizations.dropdown_menu: Use Crystal Glassmorphism style. Remove solid opaque backgrounds. Light mode: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-white/20. Dark mode: bg-[#282828]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-white/10.
shadcn_customizations.tabs: Override default padding. Use segmented control styling resembling macOS toggles.
shadcn_customizations.input: Search input in TopBar: h-7, px-3, text-[13px], rounded-md, bg-black/5 dark:bg-white/10 border-transparent placeholder:text-neutral-500 focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#007AFF] focus-visible:bg-white dark:focus-visible:bg-black w-48 transition-all

accessibility.data_testids: All interactive elements must have data-testid. e.g., data-testid='sidebar-favorites', data-testid='view-switcher-grid', data-testid='file-item-document', data-testid='breadcrumb-home', data-testid='search-input'

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a full-viewport layout (100vh, 100vw, overflow-hidden) to mimic a desktop application window. Prevent global scroll.
Left Sidebar (fixed 220px) should contain collapsible groups: Favorites, This Device, Tags. Use chevron icons that rotate on collapse.
Main Content Area takes remaining space. The TopBar must be pinned to the top.
TopBar structure: [←] [→] navigation buttons, Breadcrumbs, Spacer, Search Input, View Switcher (Icons, List, Columns, Gallery).
Implement the 4 views conditionally based on state. Provide mock data for files/folders to demonstrate layout.
Icons View: Grid of items. Folders and Files have different icons. Label text centered, max 2 lines.
List View: Table with Name, Date Modified, Size, Kind. Subtle row hovers.
Columns View: Cascading horizontal flex containers (w-48 or 200px) with border-r. Selected item highlights and shows contents in next column.
Gallery View: Large preview using the media images provided, with a horizontal filmstrip of thumbnails below.
Add a Quick Look overlay (Dialog/Modal) triggered by 'Space' or a button, displaying a large image preview over a glassmorphism backdrop.
Use standard Tailwind dark mode. Add a Theme switch icon in the TopBar or Sidebar.
Status Bar at the very bottom: shows 'X items, X selected, Free space'.
Use Lucide-React icons (e.g., Folder, File, Image, ChevronRight, Search, LayoutGrid, List, Columns, Maximize).
Strictly follow the typographic scale. The interface must feel 'small' and precise (13px body text) just like a native OS, not like a blown-up website.
